commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a `bot-proof` CLI/workflow lane for ClawSweeper-authored PRs blocked on real behavior proof, including maintainer status/comment handling and focused unit coverage.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a PR adding an automation lane, not a current-main bug report. The relevant check is source/workflow inspection plus the author’s build, targeted tests, check, and dry-run validation notes.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Queue a focused workflow/test repair for the scheduled gate; maintainer review still owns the rollout and execute-mode decision after that fix.

target.title: Add bot-owned proof handling lane
target.body:
## Summary
- add a separate `bot-proof` lane for ClawSweeper-owned PRs blocked on real behavior proof
- add a maintainer proof decision status label/comment path without changing contributor proof nudges
- wire the lane behind manual/scheduled workflow gates and add coverage for eligibility, skip cases, Mantis suggestions, and comment copy

## Why
Bot-authored replacement PRs like https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/90618 can be blocked on real behavior proof, while contributor proof nudges intentionally skip bot-authored PRs. This gives those PRs an auditable maintainer/proof path without posting contributor-style reminders to automation.

## Validation
- `pnpm run build`
- `node --test test/clawsweeper.test.ts --test-name-pattern "bot proof|proof nudge|ClawSweeper PR status label scheme"`
- `pnpm run check`
- dry-run against https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/90618 planned `bot_proof_mantis_request_planned` for head `ae868b7b18dfbd5e6a2422c8005501b57c52e15a`, including maintainer proof decision status and inherited stale label removal
target.author: romneyda

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge

commands.author: RomneyDa
